title: integration: Force amd64 on TestProxyMetadata
body:
Force amd64 on TestProxyMetadata

Otherwise test fails on other architectures due to https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/2829

Fixes https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/2830

comments.body:
> Thanks!
> 
> LGTM if tests (including on the platforms you care about) pass.

This approach fails because the override option isn't picked up by the proxy command.

I get:
http://openqa-assets.opensuse.org/tests/5776482/file/skopeo-integration.txt

```
# Test messages # TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata
# failure: 

Failed
=== RUN   TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata
    proxy_test.go:491: 
        	Error Trace:	/var/tmp/skopeo/integration/proxy_test.go:491
        	Error:      	Received unexpected error:
        	            	Testing image docker://quay.io/coreos/11bot: remote error: no image found in image index for architecture "arm64", variant "v8", OS "linux"
        	Test:       	TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata
--- FAIL: TestProxy/TestProxyMetadata (4.77s
```
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

@ricardobranco777 That’s weird; I see a failure on `aarch64` when running the tests against `main`, but both your 67584f1c28c248fe3759296e4f80eb378f9b48de and adc2bf4d8b7505ee3346be35ab40a4595badac0e let the tests pass for me.

> @ricardobranco777 That’s weird; I see a failure on `aarch64` when running the tests against `main`, but both your [67584f1](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/commit/67584f1c28c248fe3759296e4f80eb378f9b48de) and [adc2bf4](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/commit/adc2bf4d8b7505ee3346be35ab40a4595badac0e) let the tests pass for me.

I'm not running against main.  I'm backporting this PR to the v1.20.0 version we have in openSUSE Tumbleweed.
I can’t see any obvious change (at least in Skopeo itself) since 1.20 that could explain that behavior, but I also didn’t try that against 1.20 now.

skopeo v1.22.0 just landed on Tumbleweed and this patch passes:

- aarch64: https://openqa.opensuse.org/tests/5797830
- ppc64le: https://openqa.opensuse.org/tests/5797831
